metadata.title: Saša Pajić — Full Stack & AI Engineer
metadata.description: Full Stack Engineer and AI Developer building systems and tools that make work easier and more efficient.

content.headline: Functionality doesn't have to be ugly.
content.subheadline: I’m a Full Stack & AI Engineer who believes powerful backend logic deserves a beautiful frontend. It’s not enough for it to work—it has to feel right.

items.title: ABL S.A.F.E.T.Y™ Platform
items.subtitle: Enterprise SaaS — Psychological Safety
items.description: Built and launched a full-stack platform for The Academy of Brain-based Leadership (ABL) to measure and improve psychological safety across organizations. The system handles psychometric assessments, automated PDF report generation, and real-time team analytics.
highlights: Assessment upgrades (free → professional) increased ~483% vs. prior year average following platform improvements
Migrated ~18,000 users and 3,500+ historical S.A.F.E.T.Y™ assessments from legacy PHP system to FastAPI/React with zero downtime
Engineered percentile-based scoring algorithm reducing computation complexity from O(N²) to O(log N), achieving 10-30ms processing and designed to scale to 100,000+ assessments
Optimized database operations through caching and indexing, reducing dashboard load times by 95% with sub-5ms query response times
Deployed containerized production environment on AWS EC2/RDS with 99.9% uptime
items.challenge: Replace a fragile legacy PHP application with a modern, scalable system — while migrating ~18,000 users, tens of thousands of reports, and complex psychometric scoring logic without any data loss or downtime.
items.solution: Designed a FastAPI + React architecture with async background processing for email delivery and PDF generation. Implemented the S.A.F.E.T.Y™ scoring algorithms (raw scores → percentile rankings across 6 domains). Delivered mobile-first responsive UI. Deployed via Docker + Nginx on AWS.
responsibilities: Full platform architecture and development (FastAPI + React)
Psychometric scoring algorithm implementation
PS Pulse™ continuous feedback system
Legacy PHP → modern stack migration
Async email + automated PDF report generation
Containerized deployment (Docker, Nginx, AWS RDS)
Mobile-first responsive UI

items.title: ABL S.A.F.E.T.Y™ AI Assistant
items.subtitle: AI/LLM Application — Content Generation
items.description: Built an AI-powered content platform enabling non-technical team members to generate blogs, email campaigns, social posts, and internal communications using guided prompts and persona-based controls.
highlights: Enabled non-technical team members to generate and iterate on on-brand content using guided prompts and persona-based controls
items.challenge: Non-technical staff needed to produce on-brand content across multiple formats (blogs, emails, social), but had no way to leverage AI tools without engineering support.
items.solution: Built a Streamlit app with persona-based customization, PDF Q&A with streaming responses, and integrated three separate AI providers (OpenAI via LlamaIndex, AWS Bedrock for Claude/DeepSeek, and direct Anthropic API). Used LangGraph for multi-step reasoning workflows.
responsibilities: Multi-provider AI integration (OpenAI, AWS Bedrock, Anthropic)
Persona-based customization for role-specific outputs
PDF assistant with conversation history + streaming
LangGraph for complex multi-step AI workflows
Debug mode for system monitoring and model selection

items.title: RecOne AI Engine
items.subtitle: AI/LLM Application — Document Processing
items.description: Built a CV extraction and analysis application that converts PDF and DOCX resumes into structured JSON, enabling recruiters to search, compare, and filter candidates without manual reading.
highlights: Enabled recruiters to shortlist candidates by applying filters and reviewing AI-generated insights directly in the app
items.challenge: Recruiters were manually reading hundreds of resumes to find qualified candidates — slow, inconsistent, and error-prone.
items.solution: Built a modular pipeline: upload PDFs/DOCX → extract structured fields via LLM → standardize into JSON schema → present searchable/filterable UI. Added job description parsing so recruiters could match candidates against specific requirements.
responsibilities: Resume-to-JSON extraction pipeline
Job description parsing and matching
Modular Streamlit UI with real-time outputs
Structured schema design for candidate data

items.title: Pragmatic Labs
items.subtitle: AI-First Enterprise Application
items.description: AI-first enterprise application focused on advanced prompt design and interaction workflows.
highlights: Building a “Deep Tech” visual style with a custom color scale and a geometric type system to make the product feel precise, trustworthy, and enterprise-ready.
Designing a chat interface that shifts its layout depending on what the AI is returning, so plain text and structured data are both easy to read and use.
Creating the Prompt Builder as a step-by-step flow with collapsible sections and example inputs to make complex configuration tasks easier to understand and complete.

items.title: CIMBA SAIGE
items.subtitle: Student AI Guidance Engine
items.description: Chat-based AI guidance tool designed to help university students navigate academic information and services.
highlights: Designed the user interface and component system with a focus on simple navigation and fast access to common student questions.
Created a chat-centered layout optimized for clarity and low cognitive load, making AI interactions easy to follow for non-technical users.
Assessment upgrades (free → professional) increased ~483% vs. prior year average following platform improvements
Migrated ~18,000 users and 3,500+ historical S.A.F.E.T.Y™ assessments from legacy PHP system to FastAPI/React with zero downtime
Engineered percentile-based scoring algorithm reducing computation complexity from O(N²) to O(log N), achieving 10-30ms processing
Optimized database operations through caching and indexing, reducing dashboard load times by 95%
Deployed containerized production environment on AWS EC2/RDS with 99.9% uptime
Enabled non-technical team members to generate and iterate on on-brand content using guided prompts and persona-based controls
Enabled recruiters to shortlist candidates by applying filters and reviewing generated insights directly in the app
